faqs.question: Do you accommodate dietary restrictions?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a variety of gluten-free, vegetarian, and vegan options. Please inform your server of any allergies so our culinary team can take extra care in preparing your meal.

faqs.question: Is there parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer complimentary valet parking for all our guests. There is also ample street parking and a public parking garage located just one block east of the restaurant.

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
faqs.answer: While we do accept walk-ins based on availability, we highly recommend making a reservation, especially on weekends and during peak dining hours, to ensure your table is ready upon arrival.

faqs.question: Can I bring my own wine?
faqs.answer: We allow guests to bring their own wine bottles. A corkage fee of $25 per 750ml bottle applies, with a maximum of two bottles per party. Please note this only applies to wine not already on our curated list.

faqs.question: Do you offer gift certificates?
faqs.answer: Yes, gift certificates are available for purchase both in-person at the restaurant and through our website. They can be loaded with any amount and never expire.

testimonials.text: The most incredible culinary experience I've had in years. The truffle pasta is to die for, and the service is impeccably warm.
testimonials.author: Sarah Jenkins

testimonials.text: A masterclass in flavor and presentation. Each course told a unique story of local ingredients meeting world-class technique.
testimonials.author: Michael Chen

testimonials.text: Authentic, vibrant, and unforgettable. Savory Bistro has set a new standard for fine dining in the city.
testimonials.author: Elena Rodriguez
